title: Allow cache mounts to be stages and additional build contexts
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test 

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Allow cache mounts (RUN --mount=type=cache) to refer to other stages, and to additional build contexts.  Leave the don't-allow-images behavior there for now.

Update the build-check-cve-2024-9675 integration test to use different directories for its main build context and the additional build context that it uses for its final run.

#### How to verify it

Updated integration test!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
